title: Institute of Theoretical and Experimental Physics
text: Home * Organizations * Institute of Theoretical and Experimental Physics ITEP [1] ITEP , the Institute of Theoretical and Experimental Physics (ITEP or ITEF), located in Moscow , Russia , established in 1945 [2] . The main fields of research include theoretical and mathematical physics , astrophysics , elementary particle physics , nuclear physics , plasma physics , solid-state physics , nanotechnologies , reactor and accelerator technoligies, medical physics , and computer science [3] .
